data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for specific task types: upload document, watch video, purchase item, confirm understanding. However, the evidence provided does not include any confirmation that these task types are present or functioning within the system. The absence of any related endpoints or entities that demonstrate these task types leads to a conclusion that there is a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of task types: upload document, watch video, purchase item, confirm understanding.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
